cards.hook: Forget AAA vs indie. A fun game is a fun game.
cards.caption: Forget AAA vs indie labels. There are more releases now than you'll ever finish — an enjoyable game is enjoyable, full stop. The takes my feed keeps over the timeline noise.
cards.stance: The AAA/AA/indie distinction is marketing, not quality.

cards.hook: The Dreamcast still gets new physical indie releases in 2026.
cards.caption: The Dreamcast still gets fresh physical indie releases decades later — homebrew scenes outlive the corporations that killed them. Niche gem my feed surfaced.

cards.hook: Sells good? Studio gone. Sells bad? Studio gone.
cards.caption: Sells good — studio gone. Sells bad — studio gone. The games industry needs a hard reset and everyone's finally saying it out loud. The take my feed caught before it blew up.
cards.stance: No sales number saves a studio anymore — the model itself is broken.

cards.hook: 96% of indie games make no money.
cards.caption: 96% of indie games make almost nothing — most devs never see a payout. The number nobody wants on the store page. The stats my feed keeps before the hype buries them.
cards.stance: Indie dev is a lottery dressed up as a career path.

cards.hook: PlayStation ditching physical was its worst call yet.
cards.caption: A dev who shipped a physical indie says the market never left — PlayStation walked away from real demand. The industry take my feed flagged before the timeline did.
cards.stance: Killing physical media is corporate convenience, not consumer demand.

cards.hook: Should you actually make a video game?
cards.caption: Real devs behind Quartet and Geo Mythica break down what shipping an indie game actually costs you. The builder talk my feed keeps over the hype.

cards.hook: 1 year of game dev, zero prior experience — use Godot.
cards.caption: One year of game dev from zero, no experience — and the verdict is just use Godot. The open-source path most tutorials skip. The builder finds my feed keeps.
cards.stance: You don't need Unity or Unreal to start — Godot is enough.
